name: Global Connections Public Company Limited
summary: Global Connections Public Company Limited engages in the wholesale of plastic and plastic-related products in Thailand. It offers commodity polymers used in various plastic products; specialty and engineering polymers for use in engineering plastics/industrial products; and specialty chemicals and intermediates used in additives and adhesives, petrochemicals, and industrial cleaning applications. The company also produces and distributes solar power installed on roof. Global Connections Public Company Limited was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Bang Phli, Thailand.
